analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard 5th Edition D&D mechanics for class features defining spellcasting ability.
analysis.quality: High quality. Clearly defines the spellcasting ability (Charisma) and provides explicit formulas for Spell Save DC and Spell Attack Modifier, which is excellent for mechanical clarity.

uses: Used whenever a spell refers to 'your spellcasting ability'

analysis.notes: This is a foundational class feature. The inclusion of the standard D&D 5e formulas directly in the description significantly enhances usability.
